Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions:
- User account exists in the system with valid credentials.
- Network connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `john_doe` in the username field.
2. User enters `SecurePass123` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System validates credentials and grants access.
- User is redirected to the home page with a success message.

Title: Failed User Login (Invalid Password)
Preconditions: - User account exists with valid username but incorrect password.
Test Steps:
1. User enters `john_doe` in the username field.
2. User enters `WrongPass456` in the password field.
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid username or password."
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Admin Login as User
Preconditions: - Admin account exists with valid credentials.
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters `admin_user` in the username field.
2. Admin enters `AdminPass789` in the password field.
3. Admin selects the "Login as Admin" option.
Expected Result:
- System grants admin privileges.
- Admin is redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: View Product Details
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- At least one product exists in the system.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Products" section.
2. User clicks on `Laptop Pro`.
Expected Result:
- System displays product details (name, description, price).
- No errors occur.

Title: Admin Edits Product
Preconditions:
- Admin is logged in.
- A product exists in the system.
Test Data:
- Product: `Laptop Pro`
- New Price: `999.99`
- New Description: `Updated specs and warranty.`
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the "Products" section.
2. Admin selects `Laptop Pro` and clicks "Edit."
3. Admin updates the price to `999.99` and description to `Updated specs and warranty.`
4. Admin clicks "Save."
Expected Result:
- System updates the product details.
- Admin sees a success message: "Product updated successfully."

Title: Add Product to Cart
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- At least one product exists.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Products" section.
2. User clicks "Add to Cart" for `Laptop Pro`.
Expected Result:
- Product is added to the cart.
- Cart total updates dynamically.
- User sees a confirmation message: "Added to cart."

Title: Remove Product from Cart
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Cart contains at least one product.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Cart" section.
2. User clicks "Remove" for `Laptop Pro`.
Expected Result:
- Product is removed from the cart.
- Cart total recalculates to `0.00`.
- User sees a confirmation message: "Removed from cart."

Title: Calculate Cart Total (Edge Case: Empty Cart)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Cart is empty.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the "Cart" section.
2. User clicks "Calculate Total."
Expected Result:
- System displays `0.00` as the total.
- No errors occur.

Title: Place Order as Admin
Preconditions:
- Admin is logged in.
- Cart contains at least one product.
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the "Cart" section.
2. Admin clicks "Place Order."
Expected Result:
- Order is created with status `Placed`.
- Admin sees a confirmation message: "Order placed successfully."
- Cart is cleared.

Title: Cancel Order as Admin
Preconditions:
- Admin is logged in.
- At least one order exists with status `Placed`.
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the "Orders" section.
2. Admin selects `ORD12345` and clicks "Cancel."
Expected Result:
- Order status updates to `Cancelled`.
- Admin sees a confirmation message: "Order cancelled successfully."

Title: Successful Server-Database Query
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Database contains product data.
Test Steps:
1. User sends a request to the server for product data.
2. Server queries the database.
3. Server sends a response to the user.
Expected Result:
- User receives a successful response with product data.
- No errors or timeouts occur.

Title: Failed Server-Database Query (Database Unavailable)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Database is temporarily unavailable.
Test Steps:
1. User sends a request to the server for product data.
2. Server attempts to query the database but fails.
Expected Result:
- Server returns an error response: `Database unavailable. Please try again later.`
- User sees an error message on the UI.

Title: Trigger and Send Notification
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Notification system is active.
Test Data:
- Notification Type: `Order Confirmation`
- Message: `Your order #ORD12345 has been placed.`
Test Steps:
1. User triggers a notification (e.g., places an order).
2. System processes the `Premuto` event.
3. `GestioneNotifica` handles the notification.
4. `InviaNotifica` sends the notification to the user.
Expected Result:
- User receives the notification: `Your order #ORD12345 has been placed.`
- No errors occur in the notification workflow.

Title: Failed Notification (Invalid Recipient)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- Notification system is active.
Test Steps:
1. User triggers a notification with an invalid email.
2. System processes the `Premuto` event.
3. `GestioneNotifica` detects the invalid recipient.
Expected Result:
- System logs an error: `Failed to send notification: Invalid recipient.`
- User sees a warning: `Notification failed. Please check your email.`

Title: Add New Product via Aggregation
Preconditions:
- Admin is logged in.
- System is ready to accept new products.
Test Data:
- Product Name: `Smartphone X`
- Description: `Latest model with advanced features.`
- Price: `699.99`
Test Steps:
1. Admin clicks "Add New Product."
2. Admin enters `Smartphone X`, `Latest model with advanced features.`, and `699.99`.
3. Admin clicks "Save."
Expected Result:
- Product is added to the system.
- Admin sees a success message: `Product added successfully.`
- Product appears in the product list.

Title: Logout Functionality
Expected Result:
- User session is terminated.
- User is redirected to the login page.
- All session data is cleared.
